name: Relay Default
description: A calm operational landing-page template with a strong hero, ruled sections, proof cards, and a final CTA.

provenance.note: Authored as synthetic template data for the bundled Web Designer pack family.

previewFixtures.heading: Launch a sharper service page
previewFixtures.body: A concise synthetic example for a web studio packaging strategy, build, and publishing support.

previewFixtures.heading: Positioning, proof, and publish flow
previewFixtures.body: Reusable rows keep the client offer clear from draft through approved artifact.

previewFixtures.heading: Review the preview, then publish
previewFixtures.body: Nothing leaves the local instance until the operator explicitly sends the approved artifact.

name: Editorial Proof
description: A more editorial static-site template for expert services, case summaries, proof notes, and high-trust calls to action.

provenance.note: Synthetic template route; not copied from private local projects, customers, or peer workspaces.

previewFixtures.heading: A considered page for a complex offer
previewFixtures.body: Use structured sections to turn expertise into an inspectable, publish-ready site.

previewFixtures.heading: Proof before polish
previewFixtures.body: The template favors clear arguments, concise proof blocks, and visible editorial hierarchy.

name: Launch System
description: A compact launch template for offers that need capability blocks, direct CTAs, and fast scanning.

provenance.note: Synthetic launch-page layout authored for offline Relay examples.

previewFixtures.heading: Ship the launch page loop
previewFixtures.body: Plan, preview, approve, and publish the exact artifact from one local workflow.

previewFixtures.heading: One table becomes one site
previewFixtures.body: Sections, order, CTAs, and status fields stay structured so preview behavior is predictable.
